issue_title: Incorrect Input Variables List for Subflow Node When Primary Agent is Hidden
issue_body_preview:
### Self Checks

- [x] This is only for bug report, if you would like to ask a question, please head to [Discussions](https://github.com/orgs/xpert-ai/discussions/categories/general).
- [x] I have searched for existing issues [search for existing issues](https://github.com/xpert-ai/xpert/issues), in
test_description_zh: 在工作流编辑器中，创建一个包含子流程节点（Subflow Node）的流程，将主Agent设置为隐藏状态，然后检查子流程节点的输入变量列表是否正确显示。
expected_result_zh: 当主Agent被隐藏时，子流程节点的输入变量列表应正确显示该子流程实际需要的输入变量，而非显示错误的或不相关的变量列表。
